bug: BUG-002 /submit indefinitely disabled with no feedback when auth check hangs/fails
fixes: client/src/pages/SubmitResource.tsx: removed silent full-page spinner; inline labeled alert chain — authLoading -> 'Verifying sign-in…' (data-testid alert-auth-loading); auth error (non-401) -> destructive alert + Retry button (button-auth-retry) calling refetchAuth(); logged-out -> login-required alert
gateNote: labeledStateMs is dominated by dev-mode Vite module loading (DCL ~3s); pre-React the page shows server-injected SSR chrome (playwright probe sawSsrContent=true on /submit), never a blank/silent disabled state. From React mount the state is always labeled.
